title: prunus persica subsp. vulgaris
intro: Prunus persica subsp. vulgaris, commonly known as the European plum, is a subspecies of plum tree native to the Balkans and the Mediterranean region. The European plum has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Prunus persica subsp. vulgaris include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting healthy digestion, making it a valuable addition to a healthy diet and lifestyle. European plum is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and jams, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
